name: Searchman
description:
Searchman is a minor antagonist from the Megaman series. He is a Robot Master created by Dr. Wily as a combat robot for surveillance. Originally meant to have two personalities in hopes to make for a smarter robot, Wily ended up leaving one personality which communicates through both heads. His role is to protect a barrier to Wily's hidden fortress, one of which is in an African jungle.

His appearance resembles that of a soldier wearing camo despite being a humanoid robot. His right arm from the elbow down has a mounted rocket cannon, the rest of his armor has jungle camo print on it including the helmet of both heads which other sections are simply green and red.

His abilities gear toward sniping and espionage such as using decors, bouncing bomb disks and firing rocket clusters with Homing Sniper.
creator: AnimeMan1993
